scripts.fix: exit 0 && dotnet csharpier format . && dotnet format ResearchCruiseApp.sln --severity info --exclude-diagnostics IDE0130
scripts.check: exit 0 && dotnet csharpier check . && dotnet format ResearchCruiseApp.sln --verify-no-changes --severity info --exclude-diagnostics IDE0130
scripts.ef:drop: dotnet ef database drop --project ResearchCruiseApp --startup-project ResearchCruiseApp --context ApplicationDbContext -f
scripts.ef:update: dotnet ef database update --project ResearchCruiseApp --startup-project ResearchCruiseApp --context ApplicationDbContext
scripts.ef:migration:add: dotnet ef migrations add --project ResearchCruiseApp --startup-project ResearchCruiseApp --context ApplicationDbContext -o Infrastructure/Persistence/Migrations
scripts.ef:migration:remove: dotnet ef migrations remove --project ResearchCruiseApp --startup-project ResearchCruiseApp --context ApplicationDbContext
